content: Supabase Storage supports on-the-fly image transformations (resize, quality, auto format/WebP) and a Smart CDN with automatic cache invalidation on file update/delete (up to ~60s propagation) — BUT Image Transformations are gated to Pro plan and above, not available on the free tier. Bucket-level max upload size can be enforced server-side. For a free-tier MVP, client-side compression before upload (e.g. browser-image-compression) plus next/image with Supabase public URLs is the practical path; server-side Supabase transforms become relevant only after upgrading to Pro. Source: supabase.com/blog/storage-image-resizing-smart-cdn and supabase.com/docs/guides/storage/serving/image-transformations.
